observations: A mature, massively built humanoid advances in a deep hunch beneath a broken stone arch fused behind his shoulders.
The body is split between dark cracked stone on the viewer-left and pale torn, hollowed material on the viewer-right, making bodily corruption visible without floating effects.
One oversized palm reaches toward the viewer while the other hangs low; the forward mass, huge feet, and fused architecture create a slow crushing threat rather than agile weapon combat.
The wet dark hair, lowered head, and close-set stare concentrate attention on the face despite the much larger arch and torso.
defects: The very dark background and dark stone side reduce separation around the viewer-left forearm, hip, and outer arch at a glance.
The open reaching hand can read as an offer or plea as well as coercion because no target or impact line clarifies the immediate action.
uncertainties: The image alone establishes fused ruin and bodily damage but not the precise gameplay mechanic represented by the arch.

observations: Three materially different black silhouettes are shown: an upright humanoid carried inside a broken arch, a low quadruped supporting a shrine-like cage, and a broad domed architectural mass on two legs.
The first silhouette matches the master through the broken overhead ring, long hanging arm, large hands, and heavy feet.
Each candidate changes body plan and load distribution rather than merely changing limb pose.
defects: In the first silhouette the lowered head merges into the upper torso, so facial direction and neck line disappear.
The selected silhouette's large arch carries more immediate identity than the humanoid body inside it.
uncertainties: The A, B, and C labels identify alternatives but do not mark which alternative was selected.

observations: The same wet-haired mature face is shown under the arch with the head lowered, brows deeply compressed, eyes looking upward from shadow, jaw loaded, and lips slightly parted.
The gaze is confrontational and controlled while the head drop, facial furrows, and slackness around the mouth add fatigue or burden.
Cracked stone skin on one side and ragged pale corruption on the other frame the face as physically caught between two material states.
defects: Hair and the downward angle obscure part of the viewer-left eye and temple, limiting readable asymmetry.
The compressed-brow scowl communicates hostility but does not unaided reveal a specific want beyond confronting or assessing the viewer.
uncertainties: No visible cue resolves whether the slight mouth opening is pain, restraint, speech, or exertion.

observations: At native size the broken overhead arch, hunched bulky torso, large feet, and extended viewer-left hand remain recognizable.
The pale corrupted shoulder and arm remain lighter than the stone half, preserving the principal body split.
Fine fissures, facial expression, holes in the pale side, and most garment detail collapse into a dark brown-gray mass.
defects: The face is not independently readable at native size.
The dark stone arm and lower body partially merge with the background, weakening the outer contour below the arch.
uncertainties: The thumbnail communicates scale and fused architecture more clearly than exact role or emotional state.
